runs.text: Strong revenue growth paired with operational efficiency gains. On track for full-year targets.

runs.text: Cloud spend grew 32% QoQ vs. 24% revenue growth. Migration to reserved instances underway — expect 20% savings by Q3.

notes: Three wins, one challenge. Frame the narrative upfront.

runs.text: EBITDA margin expanded from 12% to 20% in four quarters while revenue grew 24% — demonstrating that growth and profitability are not tradeoffs at our scale.

texts.text: Key takeaway: EBITDA margin expanded from 12% to 20% in four quarters while revenue grew 24% — demonstrating that growth and profitability are not tradeoffs at our scale.
